hostSources.note: in-process task_info(TASK_VM_INFO) on the probe process; phys_footprint=35914328 resident_size=108085248; no special permissions, works without external tools
/usr/bin/footprint on a same-user zsh pid reported Footprint: 2112 KB with per-category dirty/clean breakdown; worked both sandboxed and unsandboxed without sudo
vmmap -summary on a same-user zsh pid reported Physical footprint: 2144K and a peak line; worked both sandboxed and unsandboxed without sudo

ps -o rss= on a same-user zsh pid reported 3056 KiB; this is the source class the base overhead spike rejected for not scaling with guest workload, kept only to re-verify the rejection in the scale test

vm_stat parsed; bytes is pages-free*16384 at probe time; only deltas are meaningful and the source cannot attribute memory to one process, so it is expected to be blocked for attribution and used only as a cross-check
